name: Almond Crescents
recipeIngredient: 2/3 Cup Sifted Confectioner's Sugar Plus More
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F and line baking sheets with parchment paper. Cream together butter and 2/3 cup sugar until fluffy. Beat in extracts, then add almonds. Stir in flour and beat until well mixed.
2. Divide dough into two halves and roll each half into a log measuring approximately 1 inch in diameter. Cut each log into pieces that are about 3/4-inch thick, and roll each piece into a cylinder that is 2 inches long. Place the cylinders on baking sheets, spacing them 1 to 2 inches apart, and shape them into crescents.
3. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until lightly golden. Allow crescents to cool before rolling in additional sugar.
